creator: tps@vr-web.de
text:
you mean '/usr/ports/net/ntp/work/ntp-4.2.2p3/version?

If, this file is 1.9MByte in size and holds the result of an
kernel rebuild. This build seems successfull --- I could not
find an error message within this file.

But it is a bit uncommon to have this all in only one line!

-- 
Thomas
